Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants a Python dictionary representing a temporal profile for a specific business process global supply chain for high tech electronics The temporal profile maps pairs of activities tuples to a tuple of average time and standard deviation in seconds

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The activities are Supplier Selection SS Order Placement OP Receive Components RC Quality Inspection QI Component Assembly CA Product Testing PT Packaging PK Warehouse Storage WS Distribution DT After Sales Support AS

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The pairs should include both directly connected activities and activities separated by multiple steps for example SS RC OP PT and so on The times should be estimated realistically for a high tech electronics global supply chain in seconds

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: No explicit numerical temporal information is provided in the prompt so I need to generate realistic estimates

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets estimate the times in days and hours and then convert to seconds 1 day 86400 seconds 1 hour 3600 seconds

Text: Process flow SS OP RC QI CA PT PK WS DT AS
